Package core

Class Ledger

java.lang.Object
core.Ledger
All Implemented Interfaces:
LedgerIntf
public final class Ledger extends Object implements LedgerIntf
Represents a set of accounts and their transactions.

  • Method Details

    • createTransaction

      public static AccountingTransactionBuilderIntf createTransaction(@Nullable Map<String,String> info)
      Factory method to create a new transaction builder.
      Parameters:
      info - Additional information for the transaction (optional).
      Returns:
      a new instance of AccountingTransactionBuilderIntf.

    • commitTransaction

      public void commitTransaction(AccountingTransaction transaction)
      Commits a transaction to the ledger. Adds all entries in the transaction to their respective accounts and adds the transaction to the journal.
      Specified by:
      commitTransaction in interface LedgerIntf
      Parameters:
      transaction - the AccountingTransaction to be committed.

    • commitTransaction

      public void commitTransaction(AccountingTransactionIntf transaction)
      Commits a transaction provided as an AccountingTransactionIntf. Delegates to commitTransaction(AccountingTransaction) after casting.
      Specified by:
      commitTransaction in interface LedgerIntf
      Parameters:
      transaction - an AccountingTransactionIntf to be committed.

    • updateTransaction

      public void updateTransaction(String transactionId, AccountingTransaction updatedTransaction)
      Updates an existing transaction with new data. Searches the journal by transaction ID and replaces the matching transaction.
      Specified by:
      updateTransaction in interface LedgerIntf
      Parameters:
      transactionId - the identifier of the transaction to update.
      updatedTransaction - the new transaction data.

    • computeTrialBalance

      public TrialBalanceResult computeTrialBalance()
      Computes the trial balance of the ledger by aggregating the balances of all accounts.
      Specified by:
      computeTrialBalance in interface LedgerIntf
      Returns:
      a TrialBalanceResultIntf representing the ledger's state.

    • getAccountBalance

      public Double getAccountBalance(String accountNumber)
      Returns the balance for the specified account.
      Specified by:
      getAccountBalance in interface LedgerIntf
      Parameters:
      accountNumber - the account number.
      Returns:
      the account's balance.

    • addAccount

      private void addAccount(AccountDetails accountDetails)
      Adds an account to the ledger based on the provided account details.
      Parameters:
      accountDetails - the details of the account to add.

    • addAccountEntry

      private void addAccountEntry(AccountingEntry entry)
      Adds an accounting entry to the corresponding account.
      Parameters:
      entry - the accounting entry to add.

    • getJournal

      public Journal getJournal()
      Specified by:
      getJournal in interface LedgerIntf

    • getCoa

      public ChartOfAccounts getCoa()
      Specified by:
      getCoa in interface LedgerIntf

    • saveToStorage

      public void saveToStorage()
      Saves the current ledger state to storage. Uses the file path from PreferencesService and Jackson's ObjectMapper to write the object as JSON.
      Specified by:
      saveToStorage in interface LedgerIntf

    • loadFromStorage

      public void loadFromStorage()
      Loads ledger state from storage. Reads from the file path defined in PreferencesService, and updates the current ledger's state. Note: This implementation replaces the internal journal and account mapping.
      Specified by:
      loadFromStorage in interface LedgerIntf

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Specified by:
      toString in interface LedgerIntf
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object

      Override @see nonprofitbookkeeping.interfaces.LedgerIntf#setCoA(core.chartofaccounts.ChartOfAccounts)
      Specified by:
      setCoA in interface LedgerIntf
